name: Country Ribs with Apples and Kraut
recipeIngredient: 3 lb Pork ribs, lean, country-style, trimmed of any excess fat.
1 medium Onion, thinly sliced and separated into rings
1 can Mushroom stems and pieces, drained, 8 oz
1 large Apple, cored and cut into wedges (or 2 small apples)
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown ribs in a slow cooker pot (or skillet) on top of the range over medium heat.
2. Season with salt and pepper.
3. Transfer cooker pot to base unit or meat from skillet into cooker pot.
4. Layer sauerkraut, onion, mushrooms, apple wedges, and brown sugar over ribs.
5. Sprinkle with celery seed.
6. Cover and cook at setting #3 (low) in West Bend for 7-9 hours or at setting #5 (high) for 3-4 hours until meat is tender.
